name: pr-review-toolkit
description: PR review workflow skills for Codex: review passes, targeted fixes, and shared GitHub comment state

interface.shortDescription: Run Codex PR reviews and fix selected findings through one shared review comment.
interface.longDescription: Codex skills for participating in the pr-review-toolkit workflow. The skills use .pr-review-cache/pr-#.json as the only review state contract and reuse the repository's shared cache/comment helper scripts.
defaultPrompt: Run a Codex PR review pass.
Fix one selected PR review issue.
Update the canonical PR review comment.
